name: Invoice Template
letterContent:
[center][b][large]INVOICE[/large][/b][/center]

[b]Invoice Details:[/b]
Invoice #: [u][$InvoiceNumber][/u]
Client: [$ClientName]
Company: [$YourCompany]

[b]Payment Information:[/b]
Amount Due: [b][$Amount][/b]
Due Date: [$DueDate]

[b]Payment Terms:[/b] Net 30

[right][i]Thank you for your business![/i][/right]
